Interface BidInterface

public interface BidInterface
An interface representing a single bid for an air conditioning installation.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    getAcCost()
    Returns the cost of this bid's AC unit.
    double
    getCapacity()
    Returns the capacity of this bid's AC in tons.
    String
    getDescription()
    Returns the description of the air conditioner that this bid is for.
    double
    getEfficiency()
    Returns the seasonal efficiency of this bid's AC (SEER).
    double
    getInstallationCost()
    Returns the cost of installing this bid's AC.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of the company making this bid.
    double
    getYearlyCost()
    Returns the yearly cost of operating this bid's AC.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the name of the company making this bid. * @return A String representing the company name. *

      Precondition: None.

      Postcondition: The company name is returned; the state of the bid is unchanged.

    • getDescription

      String getDescription()
      Returns the description of the air conditioner that this bid is for. * @return A String description of the AC unit. *

      Precondition: None.

      Postcondition: The unit description is returned; the state of the bid is unchanged.

    • getCapacity

      double getCapacity()
      Returns the capacity of this bid's AC in tons. Note: 1 ton = 12,000 BTU. * @return The capacity of the unit as a double. *

      Precondition: None.

      Postcondition: Returns the capacity in tons; the state of the bid is unchanged.

    • getEfficiency

      double getEfficiency()
      Returns the seasonal efficiency of this bid's AC (SEER). * @return The SEER rating as a double. *

      Precondition: None.

      Postcondition: Returns the efficiency rating; the state of the bid is unchanged.

    • getAcCost

      double getAcCost()
      Returns the cost of this bid's AC unit. * @return The cost of the unit as a double. *

      Precondition: None.

      Postcondition: Returns the unit cost; the state of the bid is unchanged.

    • getInstallationCost

      double getInstallationCost()
      Returns the cost of installing this bid's AC. * @return The installation cost as a double. *

      Precondition: None.

      Postcondition: Returns the installation cost; the state of the bid is unchanged.

    • getYearlyCost

      double getYearlyCost()
      Returns the yearly cost of operating this bid's AC. * @return The estimated yearly operating cost as a double. *

      Precondition: None.

      Postcondition: Returns the operating cost; the state of the bid is unchanged.
